# Decision Log: {feature or module}

> - Category: Explanation
> - Status: Active | Historical
> - Owner: {team or role}
> - Last verified: YYYY-MM-DD
> - Review trigger: {feature/module behavior or assumptions change}

Use this log for local, reversible decisions that help future maintainers understand implementation choices. Create an ADR instead when a decision is durable, cross-cutting, costly to reverse, changes an external boundary, or establishes architecture policy.

## Decisions

| ID | Date | Status | Decision | Context and reason | Consequences / tradeoffs | Evidence | ADR |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| D-001 | YYYY-MM-DD | Active | `{concise decision}` | `{problem and why}` | `{costs and limitations}` | `{test, issue, or measurement link}` | `{ADR link or None}` |

Statuses are `Proposed`, `Active`, `Reversed`, or `Superseded`. Do not erase prior entries. Add a new row and cross-reference the earlier ID when a decision changes.
